steps.title: Set up the percentage formula
steps.content: To find 4% of 350, use the formula: (percentage ÷ 100) × total = number of balls

steps.title: Calculate 4% of 350
steps.content:
$$\frac{4}{100} \times 350 = \frac{4 \times 350}{100} = \frac{1400}{100} = 14$$
There are 14 balls in the box. That matches choice B — B is correct.
